title: Income Tax Department Warns of Fake Email Claiming Tax Demand for AY 2025–26
content:
# Income Tax Department Warns of Fake Email Claiming Tax Demand for AY 2025–26

Ek important update hai. Income Tax Department (ITD) ne Assessment Year (AY) 2025–26 ke liye fake tax demand emails ke baare mein ek warning jari ki hai.

Yeh ek critical update hai sabhi taxpayers ke liye:
*   **The Scam:** Fraudulent emails circulation mein hain, jo Income Tax Department se hone ka daawa karte hain. In emails mein AY 2025–26 ke liye tax demand batayi ja rahi hai aur recipients ko ek link par click karke ek 'Assessment Order' dekhne ke liye kaha ja raha hai.
*   **Official Stance:** Income Tax Department ne clear kiya hai ki yeh emails aur inmein bataye gaye 'Assessment Orders' bilkul fake hain aur department ne aisi koi communication send nahi ki hai. Press Information Bureau (PIB) ne bhi is par ek fact-check jari kiya hai, confirming that these messages are fraudulent.
*   **What to do:** Agar aapko aise koi suspicious emails ya messages receive hote hain, toh unmein diye gaye links par click na karein, aur na hi koi personal ya financial information (jaise OTPs, bank details, passwords) share karein.
*   **Verification is Key:** Hamesha apni tax-related communications ko official Income Tax e-filing portal (incometax.gov.in) par login karke hi verify karein. Genuine notices aapke portal account mein login karne ke baad hi dikhte hain. Yaad rakhein, official emails sirf verified domains jaise @incometax.gov.in se hi aate hain.
*   **Reporting:** Aise phishing emails ko aap webmanager@incometax.gov.in aur incident@cert-in.org.in par report kar sakte hain.

Stay vigilant aur cyber frauds se bachein!

## Read the Official Document
*   [Verify all tax-related information on the official Income Tax e-filing portal here](https://www.incometax.gov.in)

*Published on: 13 March 2026*
